title: The State of Arts Funding 2026
dek: BFTA's annual anchor document on public, private, and non-state-dependent arts funding.
imageAlt: Classical sculpture and data visualization representing the State of Arts Funding 2026 report.

title: The ARPA Cliff
dek: A research brief on how temporary American Rescue Plan arts relief moved through federal, state, and local systems — and what happens as those dollars run off.
imageAlt: Classical sculpture near a cliff edge representing the temporary ARPA arts funding cliff.
expectedSections: What the cliff actually looks like
Why cities cannot replace the cliff
What Bitcoin has to do with this

title: Sound Money for the Arts
dek: BFTA's analytical case for why fiat debasement hits working artists hard, and why Bitcoin-native endowments change the funding horizon.
imageAlt: Classical sculpture and monetary imagery representing sound money for the arts.
